name: Md Arifujjaman
shortBio: I am a creative graphic designer specializing in logos, banners, social media posts, and branding. I turn ideas into visually appealing designs and ensure every project is unique, professional, and impactful for clients.
professionalSkillsBio: I focus on creativity, attention to detail, and meeting deadlines to ensure client satisfaction. I have worked with various clients to deliver visually appealing and professional designs that effectively communicate their brand message.
workExperienceSummary: I am a creative graphic designer with experience in designing logos, social media content, banners, and branding materials. I have worked with various clients to deliver impactful designs.

name: Md Nuruzzaman
shortBio: Md. Nuruzzaman is an Assistant Manager at Databrandix, leading strategic content planning and digital campaign execution for Sonargaon University. He specializes in multi-channel marketing, brand positioning, media buying, and performance tracking.
professionalSkillsBio: I have strong expertise in campaign optimization, content planning, copywriting, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive measurable business results. I focus on ensuring a strong digital presence and student engagement through data-driven initiatives.
workExperienceSummary: I have 2+ years of experience in digital marketing and creative production. My career includes 8+ months as a Sr. Digital Marketing Executive leading multi-brand campaigns, 6+ months as a Digital Marketing Executive managing paid ads, and 10+ months as a Video Editor creating high-quality marketing and social media content.

name: Md. Mehedy Hasan
shortBio: Project Manager and Quality Assurance Specialist with over 7 years of experience in workflow optimization, team leadership, and data-driven operations. Expert in Google Sheets automation, KPI development, and dashboard creation.
professionalSkillsBio: Proven track record in building teams, increasing admissions, and enhancing operational efficiency. I specialize in developing KPIs and dashboard systems to improve performance and productivity across education and eCommerce industries.
workExperienceSummary: Over 7 years of professional experience in Project Management, Quality Assurance, and Operations. Experienced in leading telemarketing and admission teams, optimizing workflows, and implementing data-driven reporting systems.

name: Md. Robin
shortBio: I work as an Executive Accounts at DATABRANDIX, overseeing financial records, reporting, and day-to-day accounting operations. I ensure accuracy, compliance, and structured financial management.
professionalSkillsBio: Detail-oriented Finance Professional skilled in accounts payable/receivable and bank reconciliation. Passionate about leveraging accounting software to optimize financial workflows to support sustainable business growth.
workExperienceSummary: I have experience in managing financial records and ensuring organizational compliance. My expertise includes handling day-to-day accounting operations and optimizing financial workflows for accuracy and efficiency.

name: Harun Or Roshid
shortBio: I am a results-driven Digital Marketing Strategist & Web Developer. I plan and execute data-driven marketing campaigns to improve brand visibility and business growth.
professionalSkillsBio: I specialise in content strategy, performance analysis, and AI-powered marketing solutions. I am passionate about leveraging digital tools and analytics to deliver measurable results and long-term success for organisations.
workExperienceSummary: I have over 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, working with educational institutions, a Nationwide ISP, and training-based organisations. I have managed paid campaigns for Sonargaon University, National Institute of Engineering and Technology, and GlobalEd, along with other growing brands. My expertise includes Meta and Google Ads, SEO, content writing, and WordPress website development.

name: Naymur Rahman
shortBio: I'm a professional video editor specializing in crafting engaging, story-driven content from raw footage. I focus on precise editing, color grading, and sound design to deliver polished, high-impact videos.
professionalSkillsBio: Skilled in managing projects from concept to final delivery while collaborating with creative teams to ensure visually compelling and strategically aligned results. I deliver high-impact videos that meet creative and brand goals.
workExperienceSummary: Experienced video editor with a strong background in producing high-quality commercial, digital, and branded content. I have a proven track record of managing projects and collaborating with teams for polished results.

name: MD Younus
shortBio: I am Md. Younus, a Telecommunications Specialist with 10+ years of experience in leading end-to-end operations. I manage inbound calls, strategic lead distribution, and multi-channel communications.
professionalSkillsBio: From handling night-shift operations to preparing precise performance reports, I ensure every task is executed with professional accountability for diverse educational and global franchises.
workExperienceSummary: Over 4 years of experience as a Call Center Executive and Social Media Executive at Jachai.com LTD, GlobalED, Sonargaon University, and Databrandix. Expert in managing operations, lead distribution, and team coordination.

name: Md. Shanto Islam
shortBio: I am a Web Developer specializing in building responsive and high-performance web applications using React and Next.js. I focus on turning modern UI/UX designs into clean, scalable frontend solutions.
professionalSkillsBio: Developing responsive and scalable web applications using modern frameworks like React and Next.js. Experienced in UI implementation, performance optimization, and collaborative development workflows.
workExperienceSummary: I focus on turning modern UI/UX designs into clean, scalable frontend solutions while continuously expanding my skills in full-stack and emerging technologies like AR/VR.

name: Sharmin Akter
shortBio: As a Public Relations Officer at Databandrix, I help strengthen brand reputation by supporting media relations, drafting communication materials, and monitoring public engagement.
professionalSkillsBio: My role focuses on delivering clear, strategic messaging aligned with organizational goals. I am adept at crafting clear messaging and supporting engagement strategies within a data-driven business environment.
workExperienceSummary: Public Relations Officer at Databandrix with hands-on experience in corporate communications, media relations, and brand visibility initiatives. Experienced in delivering strategic messaging to enhance brand reputation.

name: Nahiduzzaman Tanvir
shortBio: I'm Nahiduzzaman Tanvir, a Social Media Executive at GlobalEd. I specialize in managing leads, coordinating student inquiries, and ensuring smooth communication between students and course instructors.
professionalSkillsBio: With experience in follow-ups, data management, and student guidance, I focus on helping learners choose the right course and stay informed through organized, accurate updates. My goal is to create a seamless experience for students.
workExperienceSummary: My expertise includes guiding prospective students in course selection, managing leads efficiently, and facilitating clear communication between students and instructors. I am committed to delivering an organized, responsive, and student-centered experience.

name: Tanbira Afrin
shortBio: As a Copywriter, I support digital marketing activities by managing social media content, assisting in campaign execution, and maintaining brand presence across online platforms.
professionalSkillsBio: I focus on improving engagement, increasing brand visibility, and contributing to overall digital growth. I have experience in social media optimization, content planning, basic SEO, and performance tracking using web analytics tools.
workExperienceSummary: I am a Digital Marketing professional with experience in social media management, content creation, and online brand development. I have worked on optimizing platforms, supporting campaign execution, and maintaining consistent brand communication.

name: Nasrin Nahar
shortBio: I am a passionate Graphic Designer specializing in both Print and Digital Media. I create impactful visual solutions including posters, thumbnails, carousel designs, Instagram posts, and various branding materials.
professionalSkillsBio: From print layouts to engaging social media content, I focus on clean aesthetics, strong typography, and modern design trends to help brands communicate effectively and stand out in the market.
workExperienceSummary: Professional Graphic Designer with 3 years of hands-on experience in Print & Digital Media. I transform ideas into impactful visual content - from high-quality print materials to engaging social media creatives. My goal is to deliver clean, modern, and result-driven designs.

name: Shafat Ahamed
shortBio: Managing HR operations, administrative coordination, and accounts activities to ensure smooth and efficient day-to-day business performance. I support recruitment and employee management, oversee administrative processes and expense tracking, and maintain financial documentation while collaborating across departments to enhance workflow and productivity.
professionalSkillsBio: Skilled in payroll management, HR operations administration, and recruitment execution with a strong focus on compliance, accuracy, and process efficiency.
workExperienceSummary: Background in manufacturing, wellness, and HR service industries in Bangladesh. Expert in Bangladesh Labour Act 2006 compliance, high-volume recruitment, grievance handling, and ERP-based payroll systems.
